title: Xano auth plugin endpoint loading issue
symptom: When setting up the Xano auth plugin, the user encounters an error stating that some endpoints can't be loaded, specifically the signup endpoint.
not_this_if: Endpoints work in Xano debugger or Postman
root_cause: The issue may arise from incorrect datasource or branch naming conventions. If the datasource or branch names are not matching the expected case (uppercase vs lowercase), the plugin may fail to load the endpoints correctly.
fix_steps: Add the Xano auth plugin using default options for datasource and branch
Ensure that datasource and branch names start with uppercase letters
agent_instruction: Re-add the Xano auth plugin with the correct datasource and branch naming conventions.
